---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat(): "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point.

## Proposed solution

How should this work? Be specific about the API surface, data model changes, or behavior.

## API design (if applicable)

```json
POST /api/v1/example
{
  "field": "value"
}

→ 201 Created
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "field": "value"
}
```

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you reject them?

## Additional context

Mockups, references to similar features in other products, or links to related issues.
